creator: gunther@5stengl.de
text:
I have got the same error here.
My system and make.conf here (the build systems are ezjails).

# uname -a
FreeBSD proxy 9.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE-p3 #0: Tue Jun 12
02:52:29 UTC 2012    
root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# cat /etc/make.conf
WRKDIRPREFIX=           /var/ports
DISTDIR=                /var/ports/distfiles
PACKAGES=               /var/ports/packages
INDEXDIR=               /var/ports
# added by use.perl 2012-08-11 13:06:18
PERL_VERSION=5.14.2

Thanks,
Gunther
